news.t: Tradr ETFs Launches Industry's First Quarterly Reset Leveraged ETFs - SPYQ, QQQP, TLTQ

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long SPY Quarterly ETF (SPYQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide 2x exposure to the SPDR S&P 500 ETFs (ticker: SPY-US) quarterly price returns through swap agreements with major global financial institutions. SPYQ was launched on Sep 30, 2024 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr ETFs Launches Industry's First Quarterly Reset Leveraged ETFs - SPYQ, QQQP, TLTQ
